rules.name: email_required
rules.description: Contacts should have email for deduplication
rules.warning: Contact creation without email may create duplicates
rules.remediation: Include email property for proper deduplication

rules.name: domain_recommended
rules.description: Companies should have domain for matching
rules.warning: Company without domain cannot be matched to contacts automatically
rules.remediation: Include domain property for automatic contact association

rules.name: filter_operator_format
rules.message: HubSpot requires verbose operator names (EQ, NEQ, LT, GT, LTE, GTE), not symbols
rules.remediation: Replace '=' with 'EQ', '!=' with 'NEQ', '<' with 'LT', '>' with 'GT', '<=' with 'LTE', '>=' with 'GTE'

rules.name: between_operator_format
rules.description: BETWEEN requires two values in propertyValue array
rules.warning: BETWEEN operator requires propertyValue to be array of [min, max]
rules.remediation: Ensure propertyValue is an array with exactly 2 elements

rules.name: results_limit
rules.warning: HubSpot search API returns maximum 10,000 results. Use pagination for larger datasets.
rules.remediation: Implement pagination using 'after' cursor for complete data retrieval

rules.name: internal_property_immutable
rules.message: Internal HubSpot properties (hs_*, hubspot_*) cannot be modified via API
rules.remediation: Only modify custom properties. Internal properties are managed by HubSpot.

rules.name: batch_size_limit
rules.description: HubSpot batch operations limited to 100 records
rules.message: HubSpot batch operations support maximum 100 records per request
rules.remediation: Split batch into chunks of 100 or fewer records

rules.name: test_before_enable
rules.description: Workflows should be tested before enabling
rules.warning: Creating workflow in enabled state - ensure logic is tested
rules.remediation: Create workflow disabled first, test enrollment criteria, then enable

hubspot_property_history.description: HubSpot property history retrieval tool contract

rules.name: history_batch_limit
rules.description: Property history API has rate limits
rules.warning: Property history requests are rate limited. Batch queries may hit limits.
rules.remediation: Implement delays between batch history queries
